default_summary.markdown_formatted:
### [Optimizing content for reach @ 0:00](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=0)

Sandeep and Eduardo discuss strategies to increase the reach and engagement of the content being posted on LinkedIn. They agree that focusing on trending topics related to AI and technology, as well as leveraging commentary on tweets from industry experts, are effective ways to drive more impressions. The goal is to prioritize growth-focused content over niche or authority-building content in the short term to build an audience.

### [Leveraging AI and automation @ 16:48](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=1008)

Eduardo shares that Rhetoric has been able to evolve from a content creation agency to an "outcome-based agency" by leveraging AI and automation tools. This allows them to not only build brand awareness for clients, but also generate qualified prospects that the client's sales team can then reach out to. This new capability has been very well-received by clients, as it provides a more tangible ROI.

### [Exploring additional marketing channels @ 42:28](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=2548)

Sandeep and Eduardo discuss other potential marketing channels beyond just LinkedIn content, such as running ads, hosting webinars, and leveraging email newsletters. However, they acknowledge the challenge of making these channels effective and relevant for their high-level tech founder clients, who may not have the time or interest to engage with marketing-focused content.

### [Aligning content tone and style @ 52:03](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=3123)

Eduardo provides feedback to Sandeep that the content he has been producing could still use some refinement to better match the tone and style of a more experienced, senior-level content creator. They agree to leverage AI tools to analyze the differences between Sandeep's drafts and the final published posts, in order to continue improving the content.
